content.en:
"Sure enough!"

Ye Tian also guessed that the Qingyuan Country Lord was the mysterious Eternal Dao Realm that the First Elder said, after all, the First Elder only knew this Eternal Dao Realm.

"Will the Qingyuan Country Lord descend on the Void Realm again?" Ye Tian asked.

"I don't know. The First Elder shook his head, "Maybe, maybe not, but after such a long time, the Qingyuan Country Lord has never come, and maybe he has forgotten us a long time ago." After all, to the Lord of Qingyuan, we are just two ants, and it is not important. At the beginning, the Lord of Qingyuan Kingdom came to the Void Domain because he was seriously injured, so he healed his wounds in the Void Domain, and by the way, he ignited two creatures to relieve his boredom. "

The First Demon Venerable was killed by Ye Tian, so the items of the First Demon Venerable were also Ye Tian, and the First Patriarch naturally did not fight.

......

Human domain.

Ye Tian tried to refine the blood-colored scales, but the energy consumption in the scales was a lot, and it would take at least a long time to recover, and it would be useless in a short period of time.

Subsequently.

He sorted out the items of the First Demon Venerable, there were indeed a lot of good things, and even the first Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items were many, these were the first Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items that the First Demon Venerable had collected by himself for a long time.

It's just that these first-order Supreme Dao rule items are no longer useful to him, so they have been left there unused.

Now, these things belong to Ye Tian.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian's replica body led a group of Terran legends to the Dao Realm to go to the Demon Ancient First Vein, and destroyed the Demon Ancient First Vein with other elders, and also distributed the resources of the Demon Ancient First Vein for a long time.

Subsequently, long years passed.

The forces of the Innate Origin Alliance are constantly chasing down the Dao Void Demons in the Void Domain, and the major forces are all over the Void Domain, building bases.

Under Ye Tian's instructions, the Terrans also built bases in various parts of the Void Domain, and a large number of Terran powerhouses went deep into the Void Domain, and even Ye Xingchen went to the depths of the Void Domain.

After all, without the threat of the Supreme Dao Void Demon, the major forces of the Innate Origin Domain were naturally not afraid.

Before you know it, another long time has passed.

Millions of years after the Dao Era.

Ye Tian's copy body came out of the Myth Valley again, and it really came out, leaving no copy body behind.

After all, except for the mythical spirit in the middle, the territory of the other mythical spirits was patronized by him, and the resources were all taken away by him.

"Hahahaha, so many resources are enough to push my strength to the extreme!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian used various mythological spiritual objects to enhance the Eternal Dao, and used the Eternal Rule Disk to fuse pieces of Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items, and then used these Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items to comprehend the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rules.

Gradually, Ye Tian's Eternal Sequence Dao Rules continued to improve from the Fifty Percent Realm to the Higher Realm.

And his Eternal Dao is also constantly improving, and the progress can be faster than that of the First Elder I don't know how many times.

The first elder belongs to the kind of character who does not dare to take risks, even if the first demon lord is dead, he still does not dare to go to the Mythical Valley to take risks, obviously countless years ago, when he entered the Mythical Valley for the first time, he almost fell.

Therefore, the first patriarch is destined to be like this for the rest of his life, but this is also very good, at least there is no threat, the first patriarch has an easy life, and he can do whatever he wants.

The years have passed, and Ye Tian's eternal Taoism has reached more than two into nine, which is only one step away from thirty percent, and thirty percent of the eternal Taoism is a bottleneck, but Ye Tian is arrogant, he has a lot of mythical spiritual objects, and he directly uses mythical spiritual objects to break through.

Therefore, he easily raised the Eternal Dao to the level of Sancheng.

However, after the Eternal Dao reaches the realm of three percent, the progress is relatively slow.

Even if he has a lot of mythical spirits, this is true.

However, Ye Tian's progress from the Eternal Sequence to the Dao Rule Realm was not slow, with the Eternal Sequence to the Dao Rule items, Ye Tian's Eternal Sequence to the Dao Rule made rapid progress, gradually improving from the Fifty Percent Realm to the Sixty Percent Realm, the Seventy Percent Realm, and the Eighty Percent Realm.

Before you know it, the 30 million years of the Dao Era have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's Eternal Sequence Dao Rules were finally raised to the Ten Percent Perfection Realm, and the Eternal Immortal Dao Realm was raised to the Forty Percent Three Realm.

With his current strength, if he fought with the First Demon Venerable again, he could easily bombard him.

......

Human domain.

The human race has now given birth to a lot of legendary Dao realms, and there are many who have cultivated to reach the peak of the legendary Dao realm, and two more patriarchs have been born, both of whom are the heirs of Ye Xingchen, so they focus on taking care of it, coupled with the help of the Miluo Domain, which has broken through to the mythical Dao realm.

However, it is just an ordinary mythical Dao realm.

Ye Tian's wife, daughter, and son have now all reached the peak realm of the Mythical Dao Realm, and even the Mythical Body has been superimposed to eleven kinds, because Ye Tian has found a better Innate Primordial Treasure from the First Demon Venerable, which can superimpose eleven Mythical Bodies.

Now, they all used the resources given by Ye Tian to raise the eleven body bodies to the ninth transformation.

At present, they are also preparing to carry out eternal enlightenment.

Ye Tian didn't give them much resources, just let them cultivate slowly, there was no need to rush, anyway, there was no external threat now.

And after the Innate Origin Domain Alliance absorbed the resources of the Supreme Dao Void Demon, some elders were born one after another, and their strength was much stronger than in the past.

Of course.

Without the threat of the Supreme Dao Void Demon, factions within the Innate Origin Alliance appeared, and internal competition gradually began.

But no matter how much competition is played, no force will dare to provoke the human domain.

Ye Tian is now the number one powerhouse in the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and there are many clones, the human race also has several elders, and there are four of the top ten elders, who dares to provoke it? That's looking for death!

Even if he is the first elder, he will not provoke Ye Tian now.

Before you know it, another long time has passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Transformation had reached the Sixty Percent Nine Realm, which was only one step away from the Seventy Percent Eternal Dao Transformation, but the mythical spiritual objects he had obtained could not help him break the realm.

The first patriarch also did not understand this situation.

After all, neither he nor the First Demon Venerable had reached this realm, so naturally they couldn't give an answer.

"It should be that these mythical spirits belong to ordinary mythical spirits, and my foundation is too strong, and if I want to break the bottleneck, these ordinary mythical spirits are not of much help, so I can't break the bottleneck!"

Ye Tian guessed.
